properties.Test Case: Mess with middle grab point of a speech bubble tails. Ensure open circle becomes a filled circle. Double click on filled-circle grab handle and ensure it bounces back to default/optimal position and circle becomes open again.
properties.Steps: Mess with middle grab point of a speech bubble tails. Ensure open circle becomes a filled circle. Double click on filled-circle grab handle and ensure it bounces back to default/optimal position and circle becomes open again.
